name: Stokes & Wolf, P.C.
description_short: Colorado-based debt collection law firm handling commercial and consumer debt collection across the state with contingent fee models and case management software.
description_long:
Stokes & Wolf, P.C. is a Colorado-based law firm specializing in debt collection services for creditors and collection agencies throughout the state. The firm has been operating since at least 2005 and maintains membership in professional legal networks including The National List of Attorneys. They operate as a debt collector and are transparent about this designation on their website.

The firm offers commercial and consumer debt collection services anywhere in Colorado, representing creditors both directly and through third-party collection agencies. They charge contingent fees for both commercial and consumer claims, with percentages varying by claim type and amount. For commercial litigation specifically, they charge a 5% non-contingent suit fee that applies against their contingent rates. Clients can place claims through their website and make payments online.

Stokes & Wolf distinguishes itself through its use of proprietary "Collection Master" software for case management, enabling high-volume account handling while maintaining individual account attention. They also utilize YGC, a web-based debt placement management platform that allows clients to automate account placement, audit collection activity, and optimize portfolio performance. The firm provides regular status reports coupled with each debtor letter or court pleading to keep clients informed of collection progress.

As a debt collection law firm, this company serves creditors and collection agencies rather than consumers seeking debt relief. Consumers encountering Stokes & Wolf would typically be debtors facing collection litigation. The firm maintains $500,000 in lawyer's liability insurance and explicitly states that materials on their site are informational only and do not constitute legal advice.
pros: Operates statewide across Colorado with specific service areas in Denver, Colorado Springs, Pueblo, Fort Collins, and Grand Junction
Uses proprietary Collection Master software for efficient high-volume processing with personal attention to individual accounts
Implements YGC web-based platform allowing clients to automate account placement and audit collection results
Provides regular status reports coupled with each debtor communication or court filing
Handles both commercial and consumer debt collection with flexible contingent fee structures
Maintains $500,000 lawyer's liability insurance coverage for client protection
Offers office share arrangements for out-of-state collection agencies
cons: This is a debt collection firm, not a consumer debt relief company—consumers typically encounter them as debtors facing collection action
Contingent fee percentages are not disclosed publicly; clients must call for specific rate quotes
Website materials explicitly disclaim that they constitute legal advice or create attorney-client relationships
As a debt collector, the firm's interests are fundamentally opposed to consumer interests in debt reduction or settlement
best_for: Creditors seeking statewide debt collection services in Colorado across commercial and consumer accounts
Collection agencies seeking Colorado legal representation or office sharing arrangements
B2B creditors and commercial lenders needing litigation support for receivables
diagnosis: Stokes & Wolf is a B2B debt collection law firm serving creditors and collection agencies, not consumers seeking debt relief or management. Consumers should understand that this firm represents creditors collecting debts, making it an adversarial entity rather than a consumer-facing debt relief resource.
services: Debt collection litigation and court pleadings
Office space sharing for out-of-state collection agencies
YGC web-based debt placement platform integration
Creditor representation (direct and through collection agencies)
